_comment: Synthetic Federal Bank CLASSIC (direct) savings golden vector (no real data). Ported from the web engine's federal_bank.py; captured from a live run + balance_chain.check (RECONCILED). Classic layout: DD-MON-YYYY dates, a single amount then the running balance and a trailing Cr/Dr that marks the BALANCE's sign (consumed but IGNORED — direction comes from the running-balance delta). The optional S-prefixed Tran ID is captured as the serial and kept OUT of the description. Narration is byte-for-byte incl. the web engine's stitching of continuation and GRAND TOTAL lines.
lines: Statement of Account for the period 2026-04-01 to 2026-04-30
Date Value Date Particulars Tran Type Tran ID Withdrawals Deposits Balance DR/CR
full_text:

/payer@example/Payment/0000
